description: Complete specification for all remaining unbuilt and partially built features. Every button, every state, every navigation, every DB call, every error case defined. No assumptions. No guessing. Follow exactly.
absolute_rules: Never redirect to /login unless user explicitly clicks a login button
Never redirect to /signup unless user explicitly clicks a signup button
All modals, paywalls, popups render INSIDE the current page — never a new route
All Supabase Realtime subscriptions must be unsubscribed on component unmount
Never hardcode user_id — always fetch from active Supabase auth session
Never assume wallet balance — always fetch fresh from DB before any transaction
All money values stored in PAISE in DB (₹1 = 100 paise). Display in ₹ to user
Every async function must be wrapped in try/catch with proper error handling
Never clear user input on failed submission — preserve what they typed
console.log every Supabase error with full error object for debugging
return_url param must be passed to /login and /signup on every redirect
All RLS policies must be set before any feature is tested
Optimistic UI for likes and votes — update instantly, sync in background, revert on failure
Every loading state must show a skeleton or spinner — never a blank screen

new_tables_required.sql: CREATE TABLE wallets (id UUID DEFAULT gen_random_uuid() PRIMARY KEY, user_id UUID NOT NULL REFERENCES auth.users(id) ON DELETE CASCADE UNIQUE, balance_paise INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0, updated_at TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT NOW());

CREATE TABLE transactions (id UUID DEFAULT gen_random_uuid() PRIMARY KEY, user_id UUID NOT NULL REFERENCES auth.users(id), type TEXT NOT NULL CHECK (type IN ('topup','bet_entry','payout_win','payout_refund','platform_cut')), amount_paise INTEGER NOT NULL, dare_id UUID REFERENCES dares(id) NULL, razorpay_order_id TEXT NULL, razorpay_payment_id TEXT NULL, status TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT 'pending' CHECK (status IN ('pending','success','failed','refunded')), created_at TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT NOW());

CREATE TABLE dare_bets (id UUID DEFAULT gen_random_uuid() PRIMARY KEY, dare_id UUID NOT NULL REFERENCES dares(id) ON DELETE CASCADE, user_id UUID NOT NULL REFERENCES auth.users(id), amount_paise INTEGER NOT NULL, status TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT 'active' CHECK (status IN ('active','won','lost','refunded')), created_at TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT NOW(), UNIQUE(dare_id, user_id));

CREATE TABLE dare_votes (id UUID DEFAULT gen_random_uuid() PRIMARY KEY, dare_id UUID NOT NULL REFERENCES dares(id) ON DELETE CASCADE, voter_id UUID NOT NULL REFERENCES auth.users(id), vote TEXT NOT NULL CHECK (vote IN ('pass','fail')), created_at TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT NOW(), UNIQUE(dare_id, voter_id));

CREATE TABLE shadow_xp (id UUID DEFAULT gen_random_uuid() PRIMARY KEY, user_id UUID NOT NULL REFERENCES auth.users(id) UNIQUE, xp_total INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0, evolution_stage INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 1 CHECK (evolution_stage BETWEEN 1 AND 5), last_updated TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT NOW());

CREATE TABLE niche_members (id UUID DEFAULT gen_random_uuid() PRIMARY KEY, niche_id UUID NOT NULL REFERENCES niches(id) ON DELETE CASCADE, user_id UUID NOT NULL REFERENCES auth.users(id), joined_at TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT NOW(), UNIQUE(niche_id, user_id));

CREATE TABLE dare_leaderboard_entries (id UUID DEFAULT gen_random_uuid() PRIMARY KEY, dare_id UUID NOT NULL REFERENCES dares(id) ON DELETE CASCADE, user_id UUID NOT NULL REFERENCES auth.users(id), amount_paise INTEGER NOT NULL, vote_count INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0, status TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT 'active', created_at TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT NOW(), UNIQUE(dare_id, user_id));

add_columns: ALTER TABLE dares ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS total_pot_paise INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0;
ALTER TABLE dares ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS status TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT 'active' CHECK (status IN ('active','voting','completed','expired','cancelled'));
ALTER TABLE dares ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS proof_url TEXT NULL;
ALTER TABLE dares ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS proof_submitted_at TIMESTAMPTZ NULL;
ALTER TABLE dares ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS voting_ends_at TIMESTAMPTZ NULL;
ALTER TABLE dares ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS winner_user_id UUID REFERENCES auth.users(id) NULL;
ALTER TABLE dares ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS votes_pass INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0;
ALTER TABLE dares ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS votes_fail INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0;
ALTER TABLE dares ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS expires_at TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL DEFAULT (NOW() + INTERVAL '23 hours');
ALTER TABLE shadows ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS evolution_stage INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 1;
ALTER TABLE shadows ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS archetype TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT 'The Void';
ALTER TABLE shadows ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS xp INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0;
